mapper.select: SELECT metadata ->> 'toolResponse' ->> 'name' AS tool_name, COUNT(*) AS invocation_count FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'tool' AND metadata ->> 'toolResponse' ->> 'name' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY invocation_count DESC

SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) AS tool_steps FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND metadata ->> 'toolCalls' IS NOT NULL AND metadata ->> 'toolCalls' != '[]' GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY tool_steps DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN metadata ->> 'toolResponse' ->> 'name' = 'terminate' THEN session_id END) AS sessions_with_terminate, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS total_sessions, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) > 0 THEN ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN metadata ->> 'toolResponse' ->> 'name' = 'terminate' THEN session_id END ) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT session_id), 1) ELSE 0 END AS terminate_rate_percent FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'tool'

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_calls), 0) AS total_tool_calls, COALESCE(SUM(successful_responses), 0) AS successful_tool_responses, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(total_calls), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND( COALESCE(SUM(successful_responses), 0) * 100.0 / COALESCE(SUM(total_calls), 0), 1) ELSE 100.0 END AS success_rate_percent FROM ( SELECT session_id, jsonb_array_length(metadata -> 'toolCalls') AS total_calls, 0 AS successful_responses FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND metadata ->> 'toolCalls' IS NOT NULL AND metadata ->> 'toolCalls' != '[]'
UNION ALL
SELECT session_id, 0 AS total_calls, COUNT(*) AS successful_responses FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'tool' AND metadata ->> 'toolResponse' ->> 'name' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id ) sub

SELECT ROUND(AVG(tool_steps), 1) AS avg_steps, MAX(tool_steps) AS max_steps, MIN(tool_steps) AS min_steps, COUNT(*) AS session_count FROM ( SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) AS tool_steps FROM chat_message WHERE role = 'assistant' AND metadata ->> 'toolCalls' IS NOT NULL AND metadata ->> 'toolCalls' != '[]' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY session_id ) recent
